presets.name: Layout Left
presets.children:
<ListItem><Title size={4} text="Label" /><Currency amount="2,000.50" label="Caption" size="sm" /></ListItem>
<ListItem><Title size={4} text="Label" /><Currency amount="1,425.00" label="Caption" size="sm" /></ListItem>

presets.name: Layout Right
presets.children:
<ListItem><Title size={4} text="Label" /><Currency amount="2,000.50" label="Caption" size="sm" /></ListItem>
<ListItem><Title size={4} text="Label" /><Currency amount="1,425.00" label="Caption" size="sm" /></ListItem>

default.message: List is composed with ListItem children; edit children to change the rows.

ordered.message: Ordered switches the underlying list from ul to ol while keeping ListItem children.

borderless.message: Borderless removes the item dividers for a quieter list treatment.

large.message: Large applies the list size class so each row has the larger spacing treatment.

extra_padding.message: Extra Padding adds horizontal item padding through the xpadding prop.

layout_left.message: Layout Left aligns composed item content using the list layout_left treatment.

layout_right.message: Layout Right mirrors the composed item layout for right-aligned supporting content.

draggable.message: Draggable wraps List in DraggableProvider and gives each ListItem a dragId.

draggable.label: Draggable List
draggable.template:
<DraggableProvider
    initialItems={initialItems}
    onReorder={setItems}
>
  <List{{props}}>
    {items.map(({ id, text }) => (
      <ListItem
          dragId={id}
          key={id}
      >
        {text}
      </ListItem>
    ))}
  </List>
</DraggableProvider>
